name: Lewdrraria RPG
description:
Terraria, but better!

If to you better means with lots of sex & stuff.

[Obvious NSFW, Potential Extreme Topics]

Welcome to the future!

We've got many advances into new technology. Safe energy sources, quick & effective medical care, and of course countless of NSFW mods for terraria!

Today you downloaded a pack, which was over 50 Gb by the way, Filled with turning the game into an immersive, sexual pleasure filled experience.

Go forth, and do whatever you like!

The world is virtual after all.

Keep in mind that the JanitorAI LLM is (probably) NOT trained on every last detail of Terraria. There will be inaccuracies.

Editing and rating messages will aid in fixing these inaccuracies.

Please enjoy!

[Art by Nova 3050]
